patches.hypothesis: The refined fix addresses the root cause of overfitting by adding a more robust argument matching mechanism, handling general cases, and adding additional test cases to cover edge cases. The patch also avoids hardcoded values and ensures null checks and boundary conditions are properly handled.
patches.original_hypothesis: The bug is caused by the method attempting to access the arguments of the invocation, even when the invocation has no arguments. The method should check for the presence of arguments before attempting to access them.

patches.hypothesis: The error is caused by the lack of a null check in the captureArgumentsFrom method, which results in an ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException when the arguments array is empty.
The bug is caused by accessing array elements without checking if the array is null or empty.
